meta.description: Provider and context requirements for each component. Essential for the viewer, testing harness, and standalone component rendering. Derived from components.json compositions.must_be_inside and actual source code analysis.

ThemeProvider.required_by: All styled-components and all MC* components
ThemeProvider.notes: Must be the outermost provider for any component that accesses theme.mcui.*. Without it, any ${(props) => props.theme.mcui.*} interpolation will throw.

Formik.notes: All MCForm* components call useField(name) internally, which requires Formik context. Without it: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading getFieldProps)'. initialValues must include keys matching each form input's name prop.

I18nextProvider.required_by: Any component or container that uses useTranslation()
I18nextProvider.notes: In MSM Portal, i18n is initialized at the app root via MCI18nProvider. For isolated rendering, provide a minimal i18n instance with the necessary namespace loaded.

BrowserRouter.required_by: Components that use useNavigate, useSearchParams, useParams, Link, or NavLink
BrowserRouter.notes: MCContentLayout with showBreadcrumb=true requires router context for breadcrumb links. Set showBreadcrumb=false to avoid this dependency in previews.

MCInAppAlertProvider.required_by: Containers that use useInAppAlert() for fireCollapsibleError, fireSuccess
MCInAppAlertProvider.notes: Required for error/success toast rendering. Without it, useInAppAlert() will return undefined handlers.

ReactQueryProvider.required_by: Containers that use tRPC queries or mutations
ReactQueryProvider.notes: Required for any data-fetching container. For isolated previews of pure UI components, this is not needed.

MCGlobalStyle.required_by: All components (sets base font family, box-sizing, reset styles)
MCGlobalStyle.notes: Renders global CSS including font-family, box-sizing: border-box, and CSS reset. Place inside ThemeProvider.

provider_stack_order.description: Correct nesting order for a full provider stack. Outermost first.

MCFormTextInput.notes: Must be inside Formik context. fieldLabel can be a string or ReactNode. If using t() for label, also needs I18nextProvider.

MCFormTextArea.notes: Multi-line text input. Same context requirements as MCFormTextInput.

MCFormRadioGroup.notes: Exclusive single selection from radio options.

MCFormInlineChipRichSelect.notes: Inline chip-style multi-select for fewer options.

MCFormDateRangePicker.notes: Date range selection with calendar popover.

MCFormOptionalFrequencyInput.notes: Optional frequency cap with toggle + number input.

MCFormSkippableVideoInput.notes: Video URL input with skip timer configuration.

MCFormPanel.notes: Container panel for form sections. Works standalone with ThemeProvider. Does not require Formik.

MCFormPanelTitle.notes: Title component for MCFormPanel. Uses H_3 typography.

MCFormFieldGroup.notes: Groups form fields vertically or horizontally ($direction='row').

MCFormActions.notes: Action bar for Cancel/Submit buttons at form bottom.

MCFormFieldLabel.notes: Standalone label component. MCForm* v1 inputs render labels internally, so this is for custom layouts only.

MCFormLayout.notes: Full-page form layout with breadcrumbs and footer. Requires router for breadcrumb navigation.

MCButton2.notes: Works standalone with ThemeProvider. Supports variants: contained, outlined, text. Supports leftIcon prop.

MCContentLayout.notes: Page layout with title and optional breadcrumb. Set showBreadcrumb=false to avoid router dependency for previews. When showBreadcrumb=true, requires BrowserRouter.

MCBarTabs.notes: Tab bar component. Works standalone. Tab click handlers are passed via props, no router required.

MCCommonDialog.notes: Modal dialog. Uses portal rendering. Works standalone with ThemeProvider.

MCCircularLoader.notes: Loading spinner. fillParent prop makes it fill the parent container.

MCMoreActionsButton.notes: Dropdown action menu. Action items passed via moreActionItems prop.

MCMoreActionGroupsButton.notes: Grouped dropdown action menu for complex action sets.

MCCollapsibleNavbar.notes: Side navigation bar. Requires router for navigation links.

MCNavbarItems.notes: Navigation items. Must be inside MCCollapsibleNavbar.

MCSection.notes: Generic section container with optional heading.

MCTextEllipsis.notes: Truncated text with ellipsis and optional tooltip.

MCStatus.notes: Status indicator with dot and label.

MCSingleTextInput.notes: Standalone text input WITHOUT Formik integration. Do NOT use inside Formik forms (use MCFormTextInput instead).

standalone_button.description: Minimal setup to render an MCButton2

form_input_preview.description: Minimal setup to render a form input with Formik

content_layout_preview.description: Minimal setup to render MCContentLayout without router

full_form_page_preview.description: Full setup for previewing a form page with all necessary providers
